event.name: Bachata After Dark
event.subtitle: Lola's Goodbye Party · Bachata with Daniel Sensual
event.time: Bachata Class at 9:30 PM · Social dancing after class
event.address: 100 S Eola Dr, Ste 104, Orlando, FL
event.description: Lola's goodbye party at Orlando's weekly Wednesday bachata night on Lake Eola. Bachata class with Daniel Sensual at 9:30 PM, then social dancing. All levels welcome.

nightFlow.label: Bachata Class
nightFlow.desc: Daniel Sensual opens the night with a beginner-friendly bachata class.

nightFlow.label: Social Opens
nightFlow.desc: The floor opens into social dancing as the room warms up.

nightFlow.label: After Dark
nightFlow.desc: Deeper cuts, closer energy, and the after-dark mood fully lands.

nightFlow.label: Last Dance
nightFlow.desc: One final round before the night closes on Lake Eola.

post.text:
🌙 BACHATA AFTER DARK — THIS WEDNESDAY

Lola's Goodbye Party 🖤
Bachata with Daniel Sensual at 9:30 PM, then social dancing.

📍 Eola Lounge · 100 S Eola Dr · Downtown Orlando
🎟 Free until 9:30 PM · $10 after

Come send Lola off with one last night on the floor. All levels welcome — come solo or bring your crew.

RSVP → https://danielsensual.com/bachata

#BachataAfterDark #BachataOrlando #DanielSensual #OrlandoDance #EolaLounge
